clips.title: The Ridge
clips.prompt: Digital painting style, painterly, visible brushstrokes, rich blended color, concept-art illustration. Present day. A sweeping mountain range under a dramatic painted sky, layered ridgelines fading into haze, a valley below. Afternoon, grand. A person in a hiking jacket stands on a rocky outcrop overlooking the range, arms loose, taking it in. A backpack, a trekking pole, soaring birds. Warm painterly light, soft atmospheric haze. Crane rise. Majestic painted aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Goldenwood
clips.prompt: Digital painting style, painterly, visible brushstrokes, rich blended color, concept-art illustration. Autumn. A golden autumn forest path, tall trees dropping amber leaves, soft light filtering through. Afternoon, warm. A person in a coat and scarf walks the leaf-strewn path, glancing up at the canopy. Falling leaves, a wooden bridge, a distant deer. Warm golden painterly light. Side tracking. Serene painted aesthetic, 24fps.

Sea spray, wildflowers, distant sails. Warm sunset glow, painterly color. Static wide. Sweeping painted aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Rainfall
clips.prompt: Digital painting style, painterly, visible brushstrokes, rich blended color, concept-art illustration. Present day. Puddle reflections, a warm cafe window, blurred lights. Warm window glow against cool rain, painterly. Slow dolly in. Moody painted aesthetic, 24fps.
